text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing some shopping, Mihono Bourbon
and I are walking in front of the station, when...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oooh, what to do? What to do?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Voice recognized. Searching memory banks.
Search result—Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Falcon? Is there a problem?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! Bourbon! Hey, do you wanna perform an
Umadol ☆ concert with me?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's a contraction of "Umamusume Idol Concert."
Solo events are often held by the station.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's it! I want to mix things up. Do
something that's never been done, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You should join as a guest performer! It'll be good
practice for winning concerts too! ♪
choice_data_list: Want to give it a shot?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. My remaining energy reserves are
adequate. I can perform as necessary.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Is there anything I should be aware of when
participating as a guest performer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a battlefield out there for idols nowadays.
What's important is to distinguish yourself!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right! It could be good to play to your
strengths! Show off how you've trained your body
when you dance!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. Calculating use of
musculature for dance moves...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Calculations complete. I will utilize the walnuts I
purchased earlier for my arm-strength training.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... walnuts?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pop music is blaring out in front of the station.
Mihono Bourbon takes some walnuts and...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack. ♪ Crunch. ♪ Pop. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
N-no way... She's cracking the walnuts with her
bare hands! And in time with the song!
choice_data_list:
I don't think any of us could have predicted
this...

text_block_list.name: Regular Attendees
text_block_list.text:
Is that today's guest performer?! Wow, she's
great! I gotta take a video!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And they're loving it?! Bourbon, you really are
something...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then! I've gotta strut my stuff too! You'll
see what the original Umadol is made of! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thanks for joining today, Bourbon! What a great show! You even made my spine tingle!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The Umadol ☆ concert has improved not just my
ability to perform winning concerts, but also my
strength... How intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The unique performance was a big hit, and
Bourbon learned a lot from her guest appearance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a battlefield out there for idols nowadays.
What's important is how long you can keep going
during a concert!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! A true idol should be able to perform
enough songs for a show at a packed arena,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Initiating full-power dance mode.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's call our new show the "Nonstop
Umadol ☆ Super Concert!"

text_block_list.name: Regular Attendee
text_block_list.text:
They're ten songs in and still dancing perfectly?!
Th-this is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Phew... That is because we are Umamusume—no, we are Umadols.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's right! We're just getting started!
Now, on to track number eleven!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm exhausted... but thanks to you two, the show
was a huge success!
choice_data_list: Good work on that long set!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thirty-five songs in total, including requests. I
successfully danced throughout the whole show at
full power.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're really something, Bourbon! You're
not even out of breath!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is because my trainer has trained me well.
However... this was also good training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The Umadol ☆ concert has improved not just my
ability to perform winning concerts, but also my
endurance... How intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The energetic performance is a big hit, and
Bourbon has learned a lot from her guest
appearance!
